subcodes.first_line: O revealer of mysteries! Render praise unto God that thou hast pursued the path of proofs and evidences, and hast uncovered the mystery of the conclusive proof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کاشف اسرار حمد کن خدا را که پی بدلائل و براهین بردی و کشف اسرار حجت قاطعه
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @review of publications, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
